title: Verify Experiment Cohort Targeting: Non-Targeted User Experience
description: Tests that a user who watches content within the first 5 minutes of their trial does NOT see the Trial Corner flow.
preconditions: User has just started a ₹1 trial.

steps.description: 1. Within 5 minutes of starting the trial, start watching any premium content.
4. Check for the 'Trial Mode' widget associated with the Trial Corner.
5. Navigate to the 'Manage Subscription' section in the user profile.

expected_result: The user should NOT see the Trial Corner widget or floating pill. The 'Manage Subscription' section should show the old/standard trial management UI, not the Trial Corner hub.
